scene: Stan lying awake in bed at 2:00 with a dark ugly intrusive thought bubble over him, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps 2 AM.
A little thought-letter stamped NOT YOURS dropping onto Stan, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps YOU DIDNT WRITE IT.
A white bear standing front and center that you cannot stop looking at, a small Stan, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps TRY NOT TO.
A thought rising up out of a dark hidden trapdoor in Stan's mind, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps FROM SOMEWHERE UNSEEN.
Stan calmly handing back an ugly thought, refusing to keep it, flat warm filling the tall frame, big black caps NOT YOURS.
